channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Surface Breaking Up / Large Potholes, 7th May
item.description:
The road surface is breaking up at the entrance to Master Gunner Place, causing two very large potholes, as shown in the attached photos. Please can this be repaired ASAP. With thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berber Parade, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 7th May
item.description:
Graffiti tagging on litter bins outside Hoxton station

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geffrye Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised tarmac and kerb, 7th May
item.description:
This has been reported recently but nothing has been done. An elderly gentleman had to be taken to hospital today as he tripped over it. You can see the blood on the tarmac. This needs to be sorted as a matter of urgency.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveland Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped microwave, 7th May
item.description:
Dumped microwave has been there for over a week on Thornley Place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thornley Place, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders was in front garden, 7th May
item.description:
Excessive builders waste and wood in front drove/garden high risk of fire/arson attack
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallet, 7th May
item.description:
Pallet left outside Pilates flat on Lassell St

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "children crossing road" sign request, 7th May
item.description:
There is a lawn area between the Trinity Lift primary school and the pub Prince next to the monument. It is very frequent that many children play outside in the greenery after school. Is it possible to install an additional road sign for "children crossing" for safety somewhere close to the pub on the corner of Finsbury road and Trinity road? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trinity Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish dumped on the same spot, 7th May
item.description:
Add soon as the fly touring was cleared yesterday someone dropped so this rubbish on the same spot. CCTV cameras urgently needed to catch the culprits and fine them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimmeridge Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian lights facing wrong way, 7th May
item.description:
Pedestrian crossing lights damaged and facing wrong way, pedestrians crossing Stockwell green at junction to Stockwell road cannot see when to cross.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th May
item.description:
Mattress been left here homeless person was sleeping on

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eugenia Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping AGAIN, 7th May
item.description:
Once again people dumping rubbish on the side of my house. We are sick and tired of this. Do something to stop! Put cameras on this road, anything!!! Up to the pavement is private land and I will move this to the street from now on if Bexley don’t stop this problem. I spent the weekend cleaning all the rubbish just for this dirty people dump again. We had enough!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TV dumped Wordsworth Road, 7th May
item.description:
A TV has been dumped outside 39 Wordsworth Road, SE20

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair flytipped, 7th May
item.description:
It’s been here for one week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dericote Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp T142 Trees obscuring light, 7th May
item.description:
Trees and vegetation are blocking out the light from this Lamp column on the corner of The Knoll, Beckenham, BR3 5JJ. (Outside Blair Court)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Knoll, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
